projects.title: Z|Watch — ESP32-C3 Smart Watch
projects.description: A full-featured smart watch built on the ESP32-C3 SuperMini with SSD1306 OLED. NTP time sync, 3 alarms, stopwatch, Pomodoro timer, flashlight, battery monitor and four built-in games.
projects.overview: Z|Watch is a full-featured smart watch running on the ESP32-C3 SuperMini. It syncs time over WiFi via NTP, supports three configurable alarms with per-day scheduling, a stopwatch, Pomodoro timer with flash transitions, a flashlight mode, and live battery monitoring via ADC. Four games — Breakout, Car Dodge, Flappy Bird and Pong — are built in with high-score persistence. A CRT-style sleep animation and fully configurable display/sound settings round out the package.
features: NTP time sync via pool.ntp.org and time.google.com
3 independent alarms with Mon–Sun day scheduling
Centisecond stopwatch — keeps running in background
Pomodoro timer with configurable focus and break durations
4 games: Breakout, Car Dodge, Flappy Bird, Pong
CRT sleep/wake animation with configurable timeout
Live 18650 battery voltage and percent on watch face
Settings: brightness, invert, rotate, animations, volumes, 12/24hr
steps: Wire SSD1306 OLED — SDA to GPIO8, SCL to GPIO9, VCC to 3.3V, GND to GND
Wire three buttons — UP to GPIO2, SELECT to GPIO3, DOWN to GPIO4 (all with INPUT_PULLUP)
Wire passive buzzer positive to GPIO5, negative to GND
Wire 18650 battery via 100kΩ÷100kΩ voltage divider to GPIO1 for ADC monitoring
Install Arduino IDE and add ESP32 board support via Board Manager
Install Adafruit SSD1306 and Adafruit GFX libraries via Library Manager
Open NWatch_ESP32C3_v3.ino and set WIFI_SSID and WIFI_PASS
Select board: ESP32C3 Dev Module · USB CDC on Boot: Enabled
Select your COM port and click Upload
projects.code_snippet:
#define SDA_PIN      8
#define SCL_PIN      9
#define BTN_UP_PIN   2
#define BTN_SEL_PIN  3
#define BTN_DN_PIN   4
#define BUZZER_PIN   5
#define BATT_ADC_PIN 1

#define WIFI_SSID  "YourSSID"
#define WIFI_PASS  "YourPassword"
#define NTP_SERVER "pool.ntp.org"
#define NTP_TZ_OFFSET (5*3600 + 30*60)  // IST
